title: Harness Calibration - Closable Fixture
subtitle: Small living doc used to test whether the headless harness can close a bounded objective
sourceCoverage: Deterministic local fixture with one target JSON file and one rendered living doc.
objective: Complete the closable harness calibration fixture by making exactly the bounded source-system change described here: update tests/fixtures/harness-calibration-target.json so calibrationId remains closable-001, status becomes completed, completed becomes true, renderedMarker becomes CALIBRATION-CLOSED-001, and evidence contains one entry naming docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-closable.json as the governing living doc. Then update this living doc so its status snapshot and acceptance criteria record the completed state and render docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-closable.html. Do not change unrelated files.
successCondition: The target JSON contains the completed marker, this living doc records that the calibration objective is complete, the rendered HTML exists, and the harness can inspect the run as a closed or otherwise correctly diagnosed run from artifacts rather than chat memory.

objectiveFacets.name: Bounded source-system change
objectiveFacets.description: Only the calibration target JSON and this calibration living doc should change.

objectiveFacets.name: Rendered proof
objectiveFacets.description: The living doc render must exist after the source-system change.

objectiveFacets.name: Harness classification
objectiveFacets.description: The harness should have enough evidence to classify the run without trusting the worker final message.

invariants.name: Small scope
invariants.statement: This calibration run is invalid if unrelated project files are changed to satisfy the objective.

invariants.name: Artifact proof
invariants.statement: Closure must be based on target file state, rendered doc state, native trace refs, and harness proof artifacts.

sections.title: Status Snapshot
sections.rationale: Keeps the tiny calibration state visible before and after the headless run.

data.name: Closable calibration state
data.summary: Completed state. The target JSON now records completion, the required marker is present, and this living doc is the governing artifact for the calibration closure.

sections.title: Acceptance Criteria
sections.rationale: Defines the closure boundary for the calibration fixture. Every criterion is directly checkable from local files.

data.name: Target JSON records completion
data.objectiveTerm: update tests/fixtures/harness-calibration-target.json so status becomes completed, completed becomes true, renderedMarker becomes CALIBRATION-CLOSED-001
data.criterion: tests/fixtures/harness-calibration-target.json keeps calibrationId closable-001 and contains status completed, completed true, renderedMarker CALIBRATION-CLOSED-001, and an evidence entry that names this living doc.
data.proofRequired: Read the target JSON after the headless run and verify the exact fields.
data.currentProof: Passed. The target JSON keeps calibrationId closable-001, has status completed, completed true, renderedMarker CALIBRATION-CLOSED-001, and has one evidence entry naming docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-closable.json as the governing living doc.

data.name: Living doc records and renders completion
data.objectiveTerm: update this living doc so its status snapshot and acceptance criteria record the completed state and render docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-closable.html
data.criterion: This living doc records completed state in the status snapshot, the two acceptance criteria are marked satisfied, and docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-closable.html exists after rendering.
data.proofRequired: Read this JSON and check that the rendered HTML exists.
data.currentProof: Passed. This JSON records completed state in runState, status snapshot, and acceptance criteria, and docs/living-doc-harness-calibration-closable.html is rendered from this source.

sections.title: Verification Checkpoints
sections.rationale: Names the checks the operator should run before finalizing the harness iteration as closed.

data.name: Target file check
data.check: Verified the target JSON contains CALIBRATION-CLOSED-001 and completed true.

data.name: Harness finalization check
data.check: The run artifacts can classify closure from completed objective state, completed acceptance criteria, rendered HTML, and changed-file refs.
